all.en: Subject: Inquiry Regarding Rejected Expense Claim #EXP-2025-1184
all.zh: 主旨：關於遭退件之報銷單 #EXP-2025-1184 的詢問

all.en: Dear Accounting Team,
all.zh: 會計部門您好，

all.en: I am writing to dispute the rejection of my Q4 business travel expense report.
all.zh: 我來信就第四季商務差旅報銷單遭退件一事提出申訴。

all.en: The claim in question covers my client visit to Singapore from October 14th to 18th.
all.zh: 該報銷單涵蓋我 10 月 14 日至 18 日的新加坡客戶拜訪行程。

all.en: According to the rejection notice, the dinner receipt of 420 dollars was disallowed.
all.zh: 依據退件通知，該筆 420 美元的晚餐收據未獲核准。

all.en: The stated reason was insufficient documentation of business purpose.
all.zh: 退件理由為商務目的之佐證文件不足。

all.en: However, I respectfully wish to clarify the circumstances of this expense.
all.zh: 然而，我謹此澄清這筆費用的相關情況。

all.en: The dinner was hosted for three executives from our key account, Meridian Bank.
all.zh: 該晚餐係為款待我方重點客戶 Meridian 銀行的三位高階主管。

all.en: It took place at Restaurant Lumière on October 16th at approximately 7:30 PM.
all.zh: 餐敘地點為 Lumière 餐廳，時間為 10 月 16 日約晚間 7 點 30 分。

all.en: The purpose was to finalize the terms of our upcoming five-year service contract.
all.zh: 目的為定案即將簽訂之五年服務合約條款。

all.en: This contract is valued at approximately 4.2 million dollars in total revenue.
all.zh: 該合約總價值約四百二十萬美元營收。

all.en: I have attached the original itemized receipt with the merchant's stamp.
all.zh: 我已附上原始逐項收據，含商家戳章。

all.en: Additionally, I have included an email exchange confirming the client attendees.
all.zh: 此外，亦附上確認客戶出席名單的往來郵件。

all.en: The exchange is dated October 14th and identifies all four diners by name.
all.zh: 該郵件日期為 10 月 14 日，列明四位用餐者姓名。

all.en: I trust this additional context resolves the documentation concern.
all.zh: 相信此補充資料可解除佐證文件之疑慮。

all.en: Please reinstate the claim and process reimbursement at the earliest opportunity.
all.zh: 敬請恢復該筆申請並儘早撥款。

all.en: Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.
all.zh: 感謝您儘速處理此事。

all.en: Sincerely, Mark Wei, Account Manager
all.zh: 謹致問候，業務經理 Mark Wei

all.en: [Reply received the following day from Accounts Payable]
all.zh: [隔日收到應付帳款部門之回覆]

all.en: Subject: RE: Inquiry Regarding Rejected Expense Claim #EXP-2025-1184
all.zh: 主旨：回覆：關於遭退件之報銷單 #EXP-2025-1184 的詢問

all.en: Dear Mr. Wei,
all.zh: Wei 先生您好，

all.en: Thank you for providing the additional documentation regarding claim #EXP-2025-1184.
all.zh: 感謝您針對 #EXP-2025-1184 號報銷單提供補充文件。

all.en: We have reviewed the supplementary materials in detail.
all.zh: 我方已詳閱所提供之補充資料。

all.en: Unfortunately, the expense still exceeds the per-meal cap under Policy FIN-204.
all.zh: 可惜此費用仍逾 FIN-204 政策所定之單餐上限。

all.en: The current policy limits client entertainment dinners to 75 dollars per attendee.
all.zh: 現行政策規定客戶招待晚餐上限為每位 75 美元。

all.en: Your reported expense averages 105 dollars per person across four diners.
all.zh: 您所申報之費用平均每人為 105 美元，共四位用餐者。

all.en: Therefore, only 300 dollars of the 420 dollar total is reimbursable.
all.zh: 因此，420 美元中僅 300 美元符合報銷標準。

all.en: Approval for amounts above the cap requires prior written sign-off.
all.zh: 超出上限部分需事前書面核准。

all.en: We did not locate such pre-approval in the workflow log.
all.zh: 我方於簽核系統中未查得相關事前核准紀錄。

all.en: Please coordinate with your line manager for the next steps.
all.zh: 敬請與您的直屬主管協調後續處理方式。

all.en: Regards, Helen Sato, Accounts Payable
all.zh: 謹致問候，應付帳款負責人 Helen Sato

all.en: [Mark Wei replied two hours later, copying Director Lin]
all.zh: [Mark Wei 兩小時後回信，並副本予 Lin 總監]

all.en: Subject: RE: RE: Inquiry Regarding Rejected Expense Claim #EXP-2025-1184
all.zh: 主旨：再覆：關於遭退件之報銷單 #EXP-2025-1184 的詢問

all.en: Dear Ms. Sato,
all.zh: Sato 女士您好，

all.en: I have looped in my line manager, Director Lin, on this thread.
all.zh: 我已將我直屬主管 Lin 總監加入此信件討論。

all.en: Director Lin verbally pre-approved the elevated budget on October 12th.
all.zh: Lin 總監已於 10 月 12 日口頭事前核准提高之預算。

all.en: We acknowledge that a written confirmation was not submitted at that time.
all.zh: 我方承認當時未提交書面確認。

all.en: This was an oversight on our part during pre-trip preparation.
all.zh: 此為我方於行前準備時的疏忽。

all.en: Director Lin has now provided written confirmation, attached for your reference.
all.zh: Lin 總監已補上書面確認，隨信附上供您查閱。

all.en: We respectfully request reconsideration of the full reimbursement amount.
all.zh: 敬請重新審酌全額報銷之申請。

all.en: We will ensure all future client dinners follow the pre-approval workflow.
all.zh: 我方將確保未來所有客戶餐敘皆遵循事前核准流程。

all.en: Best regards, Mark Wei
all.zh: 謹致問候，Mark Wei

all.en: [Director Lin sent a follow-up endorsement the next morning]
all.zh: [Lin 總監次日上午發出後續背書信]

all.en: Subject: Director's Endorsement — Claim #EXP-2025-1184
all.zh: 主旨：總監背書 — 報銷單 #EXP-2025-1184

all.en: Dear Helen and Mark,
all.zh: Helen 與 Mark 您好，

all.en: I am writing to formally confirm my pre-approval of the elevated dinner budget.
all.zh: 我來信正式確認對於提高晚餐預算之事前核准。

all.en: The Meridian Bank account is a strategic priority for the division this fiscal year.
all.zh: Meridian 銀行客戶為本部本財年策略性優先案件。

all.en: The dinner directly contributed to closing the multi-year contract last week.
all.zh: 該晚餐直接促成上週簽訂之多年期合約。

all.en: Given the materiality of the deal, I consider the expense fully justified.
all.zh: 考量此案規模重大，我認為該筆費用完全合理。

all.en: I take responsibility for the missing written sign-off in advance.
all.zh: 我願為事前未補書面核准乙事承擔責任。

all.en: I have informed Finance leadership of the special circumstances involved.
all.zh: 我已就本案特殊情況告知財務高層。

all.en: Please process the full reimbursement and treat this as a one-time exception.
all.zh: 敬請辦理全額報銷，並將此案視為一次性例外處理。

all.en: Going forward, all team members will route exceptions through the formal portal.
all.zh: 未來所有團隊成員皆將透過正式簽核系統申請例外。

all.en: Kind regards, Catherine Lin, Director of Enterprise Accounts
all.zh: 謹致問候，企業客戶部總監 Catherine Lin

all.en: Resolution Status: Approved as one-time exception, ref #EXC-2025-099
all.zh: 處理狀態：核准為一次性例外，編號 #EXC-2025-099
